description: Generic HTTP API caller that sends a request to a configurable endpoint and returns the response

endpoint_url.description: The full URL of the API endpoint to call

payload_variable.description: Canvas variable name holding the request payload object (for POST/PUT/PATCH)

headers.description: Static HTTP headers to include in the request (do not include secrets here; use the platform secret store)

auth_secret_key.description: Platform secret store key for the API authentication token (Bearer token). Leave empty for unauthenticated APIs.

response_body.description: Parsed JSON response body, or raw string if response is not JSON

success.description: True if status_code is in the 2xx range and the request did not time out

error_code.description: Error code if the call failed (e.g. 'timeout', 'auth_error', 'server_error')
